name: adr009-test-file-split
description: Split oversized Mojo test files to comply with ADR-009 heap corruption workaround (≤10 fn test_ per file). Use when: (1) a Mojo test file has >10 fn test_ functions causing intermittent CI failures, (2) CI shows non-deterministic libKGENCompilerRTShared.so JIT faults on Mojo v0.26.1, (3) ADR-009 compliance check fails.
